name: Pela
desc: An intelligence officer for the Silvermane Guards.\nShe has a serious personality and is revered by other members of the Silvermane Guards.

1.name: Victory Report
1.desc: When an enemy is defeated, Pela regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

2.name: Adamant Charge
2.desc: Using Skill to dispel <u>buff(s)</u> increases SPD by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

10000009.name: Buff
10000009.desc: All status effects that provide beneficial combat buffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

3.name: Suppressive Force
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Full Analysis
4.desc: When using Skill, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to reduce the target enemy's Ice RES by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

5.name: Absolute Jeopardy
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Feeble Pursuit
6.desc: After Pela attacks, if the enemy target is <u>debuffed</u>, deals Ice <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Pela's ATK to the enemy.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

110601.name: Frost Shot
110601.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Pela's ATK to one designated enemy target.
110601.simple_desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one enemy.

110602.name: Frostbite
110602.desc: Removes <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <u>buff(s)</u> and deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Pela's ATK to one designated target enemy.
110602.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Dispels</color> 1 <color=#f29e38ff><u>buff</u></color> from one enemy target, and deals Ice DMG to the target enemy.

10000009.name: Buff
10000009.desc: All status effects that provide beneficial combat buffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

110603.name: Zone Suppression
110603.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Pela's ATK to all enemies, with a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to inflict Exposed on all enemies.\nWhen Exposed, enemies' DEF is reduced by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
110603.simple_desc: Has a high chance of <color=#f29e38ff>lowering enemies' DEF</color> and deals minor Ice DMG to all enemies.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

110604.name: Data Collecting
110604.desc: If the enemy is <u>debuffed</u> after Pela's attack, Pela will restore <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]</unbreak></color> additional Energy. This effect can only be triggered 1 time per attack.
110604.simple_desc: After using an attack, if the enemy target is currently inflicted with <u>debuff(s)</u>, Pela regenerates Energy.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

110606.name: Attack
110606.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

110607.name: Preemptive Strike
110607.desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. Upon entering battle, Pela deals Ice DMG equal to <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of her ATK to a random enemy, with a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of lowering the DEF of all enemies by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
110607.simple_desc: Attacks the enemy. After entering battle, deals minor DMG to a random single enemy, with a high chance of lowering the DEF of all enemy targets.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: Deals <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> more DMG to <u>debuffed</u> enemy targets.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

1.point_desc: When Pela is on the battlefield, all allies' Effect Hit Rate increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
When using Skill to dispel <u>buff(s)</u>, increases the DMG dealt by the next attack by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000009.name: Buff
10000009.desc: All status effects that provide beneficial combat buffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.
